IDirect3DDevice8::GetViewportOffsetAndScale

Retrieves the viewport offset and scale that are normally set into vertex shader constants c[-38] and c[-37].

void GetViewportOffsetAndScale(
    D3DVECTOR4 *pOffset,
    D3DVECTOR4 *pScale
);

Parameters

pOffset
[out] Pointer to a D3DVECTOR4 structure that receives the viewport offset.
pScale
[out] Pointer to a D3DVECTOR4 structure that receives the viewport scale.

Return Values

None.

Remarks

The following functions and renderstates affect the values returned by GetViewportOffsetAndScale; therefore GetViewportOffsetAndScale should only be called after these functions are called, after the renderstates set, and immediately before calling IDirect3DDevice8::DrawPrimitive.

Functions Renderstates
  • IDirect3D::CreateDevice
  • IDirect3DDevice8::Reset
  • IDirect3DDevice8::SetBackBufferScale
  • IDirect3DDevice8::SetRenderTarget
  • IDirect3DDevice8::SetScreenSpaceOffset
  • IDirect3DDevice8::SetViewport
  • D3DRS_MULTISAMPLEANTIALIAS
  • D3DRS_MULTISAMPLEMODE
  • D3dRS_MULTISAMPLERENDERTARGETMODE

If a title wants to move vertex shader constants c[-38] and c[-37] into other constant locations, the title should take steps similar to those shown in the sample code below:

// This code assumes that the title has written a #pragma screenspace
// vertex shader that performs its viewport scale and offset in c[0] and c[1].

// Set all render states and texture states.
// ...

// Get the offset and scale.
D3DVECTOR4 vOffset, vScale;
pDevice->GetViewportOffsetAndScale( &vOffset, &vScale );

// Load the vertex shader.
pDevice->SetShaderConstantMode( D3DSCM_NORESERVEDCONSTANTS );
pDevice->SetVertexShader( dwVertexShader );

// Load the offset and scale into the new constant locations.
pDevice->SetVertexShaderConstant( 0, &vOffset, 1 );
pDevice->SetVertexShaderConstant( 1, &vScale, 1 );

// Load the other vertex shader constants.
// ...

// And finally, render.
pDevice->DrawPrimitive( D3DPT_TRIANGLESTRIP, 0, dwNumPrimitives );

Requirements

Header: Declared in D3d8.h.

Import Library: Use D3d8.lib.

See Also

IDirect3DDevice8::SetShaderConstantMode
